== Notes for [[Item:Q81862|Q81862]] ==

From ''Banu Azd'' Tribe of Yemen.

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fatimah_bint_Sa%27d
--------------------
From ''Banu Azd'' Tribe of Yemen.

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Asma_bint_Adiy_al-Bariqiyyah

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
